name: Verify if User sees error message upon giving invalid python code in Editor box after navigating to tryEditor page from Binary Tree Traversals  page

steps.name: Given User is in landing page
When User clicks on getStarted button in landing page and SignIn button in Home Page
And User enters valid credentials for login and Clicks Submit in Login Page
Then User should navigate to home Page with title "NumpyNinja"
When User enters invalid python code in the textBox from "TryEditor" and  1 to tryEditor page from Binary Tree Traversals page and clicks on run button
Then User should see alert error message of try editor page from Binary Tree Traversals in Python page
